title: Cloak of Many Fashions

markdown:
# Cloak of Many Fashions

While wearing this cloak, you can take a [[bonus_action]] to change the style, color, and apparent quality of the garment. The cloak's weight doesn't change. Regardless of its appearance, the cloak can't be anything but a cloak. Although it can duplicate the appearance of other magic cloaks, it doesn't gain their magical properties.
